subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of one of the handmaidens, that she may, with supreme joy and utmost gladness, praise the Lord of Pre-existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی یکی از اماء را ذکر مینماید تا بسرور اکبر و فرح اعظم بحمد مالک قدم
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun
